title: 石門國小資訊科技駕駛艙：答題快打 Suno 音樂包

ultimate.sunoPrompt: Instrumental only. A short 8-second ultimate-combo stinger for a child-friendly technology quiz fighting game: instant bright synth rise, three rhythmic digital impact hits, sparkling chiptune arpeggio, heroic marimba flourish, clean final power chord. Energetic, playful, triumphant, no vocals, no lyrics, no scary or aggressive mood.
